subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Bountiful unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, thy mention hath been recorded before the Wronged One and hath been revealed unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الوهاب لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم قد ذکر ذکرک لدی المظلوم و نزل لک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
